# Alexander Yansons

> Portfolio site for Alexander Yansons — independent web developer and creative technologist based in Warsaw, Poland.

## Summary

Alexander builds custom websites, e-commerce, portfolios, and product UI for brands, studios, and product teams. The site showcases selected case studies, an experimental archive, and a contact path for new work.

## About this site

The live portfolio is at https://yansons.online/. Case study pages describe stack, role, and outcomes. The spatial archive at https://yansons.online/archive/ collects experiments and visual studies. The work grid on the homepage anchors at https://yansons.online/#work.

## Common questions

### What kinds of projects do you take on?

I work on marketing sites, portfolios, e-commerce, and product UI—anything where structure, UX, and performance matter. Briefs range from brand-led launches to more technical dashboards and internal tools.

### How should I get in touch for a new project?

Email hello@yansons.online with a short note: goals, timeline, budget range if you can share it, and links to references or live products. That context makes the first reply much more useful.

### Where are you based, and do you work remotely?

I am based in Warsaw, Poland, and collaborate with teams and clients internationally. Most work is remote-first; on-site sessions are possible when the project needs them.

## Primary pages

- Home: https://yansons.online/
- Project index (from home): https://yansons.online/#work
- Archive: https://yansons.online/archive/

## Contact

- Email: hello@yansons.online
- Scheduling: use the “Schedule a call” control on the homepage when available.

## For automated agents

- Machine-readable sitemap: https://yansons.online/sitemap.xml
- Crawl policy: https://yansons.online/robots.txt
